name: SHA-3 Standard: Permutation-Based Hash and Extendable-Output Functions
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: FIPS 202 (2015) standardizes SHA-3 — the Keccak-derived hash family chosen via NIST's open competition. Complements (does not replace) SHA-2.
relationToCloudSecurity: Used in cloud-platform hashing applications; FIPS 203 derived constructions use SHA-3 internally.
relationToAISecurity: Used in some AI model-signing and provenance constructions.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
